section.small: estimation from 41.9mb of code in 1529 edited files across 740 commits

section.div: [AAAI-2025] This repository contains MAPF-GPT, a deep learning-based model for solving MAPF problems. Trained with imitation learning on trajectories produced by LaCAM, it generates actions under partial observability without heuristics or agent communication. MAPF-GPT excels on unseen instances and outperforms learnable state-of-the-art solvers

[ICLR-2025] POGEMA stands for Partially-Observable Grid Environment for Multiple Agents. This is a grid-based environment that was specifically designed to be flexible, tunable and scalable. It can be tailored to a variety of PO-MAPF / MAPF settings.
A program that displays temperature on the thermal right cpu cooler's digital screen for Linux.
Optical character recognition for Japanese text, with the main focus being Japanese manga
Noise reduction in python using spectral gating (speech, bioacoustics, audio, time-domain signals)

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
